const Anthropic = require("@anthropic-ai/sdk");

const client = new Anthropic();

async function handler(input) {
  try {
    // Validate input
    if (!input) {
      return { error: "Input is required" };
    }

    // Parse input to extract numbers
    let numbers = [];

    if (typeof input === "string") {
      // Try to parse as JSON array first
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(input);
        if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
          numbers = parsed.filter((n) => typeof n === "number");
        } else if (typeof parsed === "object" && parsed.numbers) {
          numbers = parsed.numbers.filter((n) => typeof n === "number");
        }
      } catch {
        // If not JSON, try to extract numbers from string
        const matches = input.match(/-?\d+\.?\d*/g);
        if (matches) {
          numbers = matches.map(Number);
        }
      }
    } else if (Array.isArray(input)) {
      numbers = input.filter((n) => typeof n === "number");
    } else if (typeof input === "object" && input.numbers) {
      numbers = input.numbers.filter((n) => typeof n === "number");
    }

    if (numbers.length === 0) {
      return { error: "No valid numbers found in input" };
    }

    // Calculate statistics locally
    const count = numbers.length;
    const sum = numbers.reduce((acc, n) => acc + n, 0);
    const average = sum / count;
    const min = Math.min(...numbers);
    const max = Math.max(...numbers);

    // Create a summary message for Claude
    const summaryText = `Numbers provided: ${numbers.join(", ")}\n\nStatistics:\n- Count: ${count}\n- Sum: ${sum}\n- Average: ${average.toFixed(2)}\n- Min: ${min}\n- Max: ${max}`;

    // Use Claude to generate a natural language summary
    const message = await client.messages.create({
      model: "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022",
      max_tokens: 1024,
      messages: [
        {
          role: "user",
          content: `Please provide a brief, natural language summary of these number statistics:\n\n${summaryText}`,
        },
      ],
    });

    const claudeSummary =
      message.content[0].type === "text" ? message.content[0].text : "";

    return {
      data: {
        numbers,
        statistics: {
          count,
          sum,
          average: parseFloat(average.toFixed(2)),
          min,
          max,
        },
        summary: claudeSummary,
      },
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error occurred",
    };
  }
}

// Main execution
async function main() {
  // Test with different input formats
  const testInputs = [
    [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    "10, 20, 30, 40, 50",
    JSON.stringify({ numbers: [5, 10, 15, 20, 25] }),
  ];

  for (const input of testInputs) {
    console.log(`\nProcessing input: ${JSON.stringify(input)}`);
    const result = await handler(input);
    console.log("Result:", JSON.stringify(result, null, 2));
  }
}

main().catch(console.error);
